title: Newly Open Landmark Overlook Walk Connects Downtown Seattle & Pike Place Market To Waterfront
content:
Newly Open Landmark Overlook Walk Connects Downtown Seattle & Pike Place Market To Waterfront
Lao Ocean
16300 subscribers
262 likes
4676 views
23 Oct 2024
Newly open Overlook Walk is an elevated pedeastrian walkway and park that seamlessly connects Downtown Seattle and Pike Place to the Seattle Waterfront. In this video I pay the Overlook Walk a visit after showing some relatives visiting from Laos around Pike Place Market. 

We also got coffee from Ghost Alley Espresso and some award winning chowder from Pike Place Chowder during out adventure at Pike Place Market.
